title: Scott Bessent sworn in as 79th Secretary of the Department of Treasury
summary: Scott Bessent was sworn in as the 79th Secretary of the Treasury on January 28, 2025, by Supreme Court Justice Brett M. Kavanaugh. This is a biographical/ceremonial press release containing no macro policy content, economic data, or market signals.
key_points: Scott Bessent sworn in as 79th Secretary of the Treasury on January 28, 2025
Previously served as CEO/CIO of Key Square Capital Management (founded 2015), a macro-focused hedge fund
Former Chief Investment Officer of Soros Fund Management
Described as a currency and fixed income specialist with experience across 60 countries
Responsibilities include maintaining strong economy, fostering economic growth, and managing U.S. government finances
No substantive policy statements or macro guidance contained in this announcement
